conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon. The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
response:
Subject: Thank You – Conclusion of Internship Program

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunity to complete my internship under your supervision. Looking back on this experience, it has been a transformative chapter in my academic and professional development. The mentorship you provided not only guided me through the challenges we faced but also encouraged me to think critically and creatively about complex problems.

The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks. However, beyond the technical skills I gained, I deeply value the clarity and wisdom you shared regarding the broader implications of these tools in our field. Your encouragement fostered an environment where I felt comfortable taking calculated risks and exploring new ideas, which was essential for my growth as a researcher.

Thank you again for your time, guidance, and unwavering support throughout this program. I have taken great pride in contributing to the team and am eager to apply what I have learned moving forward. Please let me know if there are any future opportunities I might explore or if you would like to discuss how these experiences could inform my next steps.

Warmly,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Current Title/Position]
[Your Contact Information]<|im_end|>
